data.body: 5f39 PLAN-REVIEW PASS+signed after 10 rounds (marker-based auto-marking canary keyed on _live_jira_ready; exact reconcile-bridge workflow steps incl JIRA_PROJECT+acli auth; pytest_sessionfinish hook). Claimed. LANDING: rebased 18-commit stack onto origin/main@2272d68ca, re-pushed, CI at 14/18 green no reds (538 rechecking a flake). Dispatching 5f39 subagent while CI finishes; will submit 555 to land the 18 when all green.
